sky.football.uk.description: Wembley Stadium sees the Sky Bet Championship play-off final between Leeds and Southampton. After their respective relegations, who will earn an immediate return to the top flight? (26.05)

sky.football.uk.title: EFL 18/19: Aston Villa v Leeds Utd

sky.football.uk.title: EFL 18/19: Aston Villa v Sheff Utd
sky.football.uk.description: In 2019 at Villa Park, Tyrone Mings, Tammy Abraham and Andre Green saved Villa's blushes, scoring three goals in the final 10 minutes to steal a point from the visiting Sheffield United.

sky.football.uk.title: EFL 18/19: Charlton v Doncaster

sky.f1.uk.title: Spanish F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's an all-papaya front row as McLaren lead the way with Oscar Piastri from Lando Norris. Max Verstappen and George Russell form the second row, while Lewis Hamilton starts P5. (01.06)

sky.f1.uk.title: Canadian F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out for the Canadian Grand Prix as George Russell and Max Verstappen line-up alongside each other at the front with Oscar Piastri in third. Lando Norris comes from P7. (15.06)

sky.f1.uk.title: Austrian F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: Lando Norris bounces back to take pole alongside Charles Leclerc. Oscar Piastri and Lewis Hamilton share row two, while Max Verstappen starts down in P7 for Red Bull's home race. (29.06)

sky.f1.uk.title: British F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Silverstone. Max Verstappen shares the front row with Oscar Piastri, while Brits Lando Norris, George Russell and Lewis Hamilton round out the top five. (06.07)

sky.f1.uk.title: Belgian F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Spa. With eyes on the weather, Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri lock out the front, while Charles Leclerc starts P3. Lewis Hamilton bids to fight through the field. (27.07)

sky.f1.uk.title: Hungarian F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at the Hungaroring. As Charles Leclerc goes up against the McLarens from pole, both Max Verstappen and Lewis Hamilton face tough recovery drives from further back. (03.08)

sky.f1.uk.title: Dutch F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out in Zandvoort. Pipping his team mate to pole, Oscar Piastri leads Lando Norris as Max Verstappen looks to spring a surprise from P3 with Isack Hadjar for company. (31.08)

sky.f1.uk.title: Italian F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Monza. Max Verstappen holds pole from title contenders Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri as Charles Leclerc leads the Ferrari charge with Lewis Hamilton down in P10. (07.09)

sky.f1.uk.title: Azerbaijan F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: In Baku, Max Verstappen leads a mixed-up starting grid with Carlos Sainz and Liam Lawson in podium contention. Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri bid to come through the field. (21.09)

sky.f1.uk.title: Singapore F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Marina Bay Circuit for the 2025 Singapore Grand Prix. George Russell claims Mercedes' second pole of the season, with Max Verstappen starting in second. (05.10)

sky.f1.uk.title: US F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out for the United States Grand Prix. A growing threat in the title fight, Max Verstappen has pole from Lando Norris as championship leader Oscar Piastri starts in P6. (19.10)

sky.f1.uk.title: Mexico City F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out in Mexico City. Lando Norris aims to capitalise on a big opening in the title race as the Ferraris of Charles Leclerc and Lewis Hamilton round out the top three. (26.10)

sky.f1.uk.title: Sao Paulo F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Interlagos. An opportunity presents itself to poleman Lando Norris in the title chase with Oscar Piastri starting P4 and Max Verstappen way down the grid. (09.11)

sky.f1.uk.title: Las Vegas F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: As the lights go out on the Strip for the Las Vegas Grand Prix, championship leader Lando Norris starts from P1 with Max Verstappen behind. Oscar Piastri lines up in fifth place. (23.11)

sky.f1.uk.title: Qatar F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out in Qatar. As Lando Norris lines up in P2 a win away from the world championship, it's down to polesitter Oscar Piastri and Max Verstappen to deny the Brit the title. (30.11)

sky.f1.uk.title: Abu Dhabi F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out for the title decider. Starting behind polesitter Max Verstappen, Lando Norris will become world champion with a podium. Oscar Piastri has it all to do from third. (07.12)

sky.mix.uk.title: 2025 Season Review
sky.mix.uk.description: As the 2025 chapter in Formula 1 history came to a close with Lando Norris claiming a maiden world championship, join the Sky Sports F1 team for an in-depth review of the season.

sky.mix.uk.title: 30 Years of the PDC World Champs'
sky.mix.uk.description: In celebration of 30 years of the PDC World Darts Championship, take a look back at the very first tournament, a classic final from 2007 and one of the greatest legs ever played. Ep 1.

sky.mix.uk.title: The Taylor Years
sky.mix.uk.description: Hear from the legendary Phil Taylor as the 16-time world champion recounts his glory years at the PDC World Darts Championship. Ep 2.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Arsenal/Spurs 08
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Arsenal meet Tottenham Hotspur in the north London derby in 2008-09 season, in a match that saw a stunning comeback.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest: Man U/Arsenal '98
sky.mix.uk.description: Remember a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Arsenal visit Alex Ferguson's Manchester United at Old Trafford back in the 1997-98 season.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest: Man Utd/Everton 2012
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Man Utd host Everton at Old Trafford in a captivating eight-goal thriller back in 2012.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Newc/Leics '97
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, Newcastle United host Leicester City in a seven-goal thriller at St James' Park in the 1996-97 season.

sky.mix.uk.title: Sao Paulo F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's lights out at Interlagos. An opportunity presents itself to poleman Lando Norris in the title chase with Oscar Piastri starting P4 and Max Verstappen way down the grid. (09.11)

sky.mix.uk.title: Las Vegas F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: As the lights go out on the Strip for the Las Vegas Grand Prix, championship leader Lando Norris starts from P1 with Max Verstappen behind. Oscar Piastri lines up in fifth place. (23.11)

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: N. Forest v Newcastle
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, Nottingham Forest take on Newcastle United at the City Ground in a game that saw two red cards and two penalties.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Leeds Utd v Aston Villa
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Leeds United face Aston Villa in the Sky Bet Championship, with the sides meeting in the league for the first time since 2004.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Huddersfield v Leeds
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, a West Yorkshire derby as Huddersfield Town play Leeds United in 2017 in the Sky Bet Championship.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Sheff Weds v Newcastle
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Sheffield Wednesday take on Newcastle United in 2017 in the Sky Bet Championship, with both sides looking for promotion chances.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In a three-hour test of wills, Justine Henin was bidding to close an up-and-down year with the defence of her WTA Finals title against Maria Sharapova in 2007.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In a match that would decide the 2016 year-end world number one, Andy Murray - looking to cap a storybook season at The O2 in London - met rival Novak Djokovic at the ATP Finals.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Fulham v Aston Villa
sky.mix.uk.description: Remember some classic matches from English football. In this episode, Fulham looked to maintain their playoff hopes against Aston Villa in the Sky Bet Championship in April 2017.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 17/18: N. Forest v Ipswich
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Nottingham Forest look to avoid relegation from the Sky Bet Championship as they face Ipswich Town in May 2017.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 12/13: Brentford v Swindon
sky.mix.uk.description: Remember some classic matches from English football. Here, Brentford face Swindon Town in May 2013 in the League 1 semi final at Griffin Park.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 12/13: Bradford v Arsenal
sky.mix.uk.description: A look at some of the greatest matches from English football. Here, League 2 side Bradford City take on Premier League giants Arsenal in the Football League Cup in December 2012.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Final: Rotterdam
sky.mix.uk.description: Top seed Alex de Minaur competes in his third consecutive Rotterdam final as former champion Felix Auger-Aliassime bids to deny the Australian a long-awaited trophy at the ATP 500. (15.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Final: Dallas

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Peacock Salem Cleaners. The crew stay close to home to salvage the old Salem Peacock Cleaners. Over 100 years old, the building is filled with antique laundromat parts. S8, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Cosby Brothers Mill. The crew heads to an old mill where they hope to salvage parts - if they can get them down safely. Plus, Mike and Robert see what they can do with an old barn. S8, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Once Upon A Mine Part 1. Nome's King Shawn edges closer to his goal. Queen Emily has a pump crisis that could end her season. Wizard Zeke returns to Cape Rodney. S10, Ep17

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Once Upon A Mine Part 2. Nome's King Shawn edges closer to his goal. Queen Emily has a pump crisis that could end her season. Wizard Zeke returns to Cape Rodney. S10, Ep18

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: A tragic injury forces Ethan to step up and run the Poseidon Crew solo. Jacqui and Andrew face dangerous wildlife as they go deeper into the jungle. S9, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Ice Age Predator. Fisherman and adventurer, Jeremy Wade, is on an epic journey to catch a prehistoric monster - the man-sized pike in the lakes of Ireland. Will he find it? S1, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Disorder On The Border. Crew conflict in winter weather puts Johnathan's leadership to the test. Sig and Mandy risk a heavy fine chasing the biomass along a boundary line. S19, Ep18

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Beware The King Tide. Johnathan drives the Time Bandit into towering waves to haul the riskiest set of his career. Jake faces a potentially unstoppable magnesium fire. S19, Ep19

DMAXUK.uk.title: Cooper's Treasure
DMAXUK.uk.description: 500 Million Dollar List. Last season, Miklos located a shipwreck tied to Christopher Columbus using Cooper's intel. Now, Miklos has 8 weeks of cash left to find another shipwreck. S2, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials
DMAXUK.uk.description: Close Encounters. Josh Gates starts his extra-terrestrial search with a visit to NASA and an alien-hunting expedition in Chile, where scientists make new discoveries. S1, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials
DMAXUK.uk.description: Ancient Visitors. Josh is on Easter Island, where ancient alien theorists believe aliens visited millennia ago. And, he goes meteorite hunting in Zimbabwe. S1, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Fire On The Forty. An inferno engulfs Marty and Mollee's cabin at the onset of winter, and the Raneys rush to complete the unfinished clifftop cabin with heat, water and power. S1, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch
DMAXUK.uk.description: On Thin Ice. Marty attempts a treacherous trip across a frozen river. And, Misty and Maciah build a pump house to secure the family's new water source on the Upper 20. S1, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: One Plus One Equals Three. Rod, Sam and Ben use their last dig of the season to secure enough opal for Les' retirement. Cody almost meets his demise down a 10-metre mine shaft. S7, Ep20

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Opal Fever. Opal fever has struck! In South Australia, rookie miners Daniel Becker and Justin Lang leave their lives behind, risking all to chase an opal fortune. S1, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Super Typhoon Part 1. With the typhoon Nuri closing in, Captains are forced to make hard choices. The Northwestern charges into the storm, while the Cape Caution retreats to land. S11, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Super Typhoon Part 2. A typhoon puts livelihoods on the line, with Rookie skipper Josh Harris's weaknesses exposed and Captain Sig's control of the Northwestern in jeopardy. S11, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Hoffman Family Gold
DMAXUK.uk.description: Million-Dollar Mistake. A routine mining decision leads to disaster when silt runoff threatens a nearby creek. Todd attempts an engineering solution to help save the mine. S2, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Twice Bitten, Twice Shy. When Sig discovers Jake stole his fishing data, he deals his protégé a lesson he won't soon forget. Rick faces a deckhand rattled by incessant waves. S20, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Gold Timers fight back against gold thieves. Machinery problems continue to plague the Dust Devils, while Marcus is panicked when Linden goes missing. S6, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked And Afraid
DMAXUK.uk.description: Frozen And Afraid. Dropped onto an Alaskan glacier, all-star survivalists Laura and Steven stave off frostbite and hypothermia. Their skills and survivor instinct are tested. S5, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked And Afraid
DMAXUK.uk.description: Honduran Hell. In the Honduran rainforest, a survivalist and a hard-headed detective try to thrive for 21 days. But, jaguars, fire ants and a debilitating injury may stop them. S5, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Navy Seal Boat. The team travel to a shipyard to salvage a boat once used for Navy SEAL insertions. Their patience is tested once they realize the boat won't fit on the trailer. S8, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Parkville Farmhouse. The team heads to Parkville, Maryland, to salvage a classic farmhouse. With the house picked clean, Mike rewards the Dawgs with indoor skydiving! S8, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Last Call Part 1. With just 24 hours left to make or break the season, an equipment malfunction jeopardises Shawn's operation. Kris becomes the last Kelly standing. S10, Ep19

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Last Call Part 2. With just 24 hours left to make or break the season, an equipment malfunction jeopardises Shawn's operation. Kris becomes the last Kelly standing. S10, Ep20

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Justin and Chloe fly choppers to detect in the outback. The Gold Devils pack up their Phoenix Project and try not to leave any gold behind. S9, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Italy's Lake Monster. Fisherman and adventurer, Jeremy Wade, travels to Lake Garda in northern Italy to investigate a 16th century monster fish. What secrets is the lake hiding? S1, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Battleship. Hampered by damage, Sig must outmanoeuvre an unknown captain to hold onto his ground. Jake allies with Wild Bill to make a critical deadline. S19, Ep20

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Last Stand Of John Hillstrand. Johnathan's crab pots are in peril. Sig seeks a Bairdi hotspot with a decades-old computer. Jake's short on crew and must put his niece on hydraulics. S19, Ep21

DMAXUK.uk.title: Cooper's Treasure
DMAXUK.uk.description: Hunt For The Gold Table. After discovering a 1700s-era cannon Darrell seeks the ship's origin. A letter in Gordon's files details a 16th century wreck connected to Sir Francis Drake. S2, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials
DMAXUK.uk.description: UFOs Over England. In Zimbabwe Josh interviews witnesses to one of the largest ever UFO sightings. Then, in England, he examines a case known as 'Europe's Roswell.' S1, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials
DMAXUK.uk.description: Roswell Revealed. Josh's search for alien life ends in the USA, with a hot case in Arkansas. And, there's shocking new evidence in the Roswell crash. S1, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Count Your Blessings. The frozen access road to the Upper 20 becomes impassable, so Marty devises a risky way to transport massive equipment up the 300-foot icy cliff. S1, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Dead Of Winter. With several critical projects to complete, the Raneys face a season-ending winter storm. The family rushes to make the cabin liveable through winter. S1, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Sky Is Falling. Justin and Daniel tread a dangerous path deep underground in an abandoned mine. Meanwhile, Kelly and Al search for the rare, valuable black opal. S1, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Legend Returns. Mick's mining operation grinds to a halt when the conveyor belt rips on a piece of machinery. In need of cash, he heads out of town on another job. S1, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Wasted Talent. With a 1.5 million dollar boat of his own and more King Crab quota than any other captain in the fleet, Elliott Neese throws it all away and bids a final farewell. S11, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Heavy Lies the Crown. On the Northwestern Jake gets a Whiplash-style captaining lesson from Sig and a long trip and a prank threaten Captain Johnathan's catch on the Time Bandit. S11, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: New: Maine Cabin Masters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Damage To Lakeside Dream Cabin. The team faces a challenging cabin restoration after a massive tree damages a camp. They'll raise ceilings and move the kitchen for lake views. S15, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: New: Barnwood Builders
DMAXUK.uk.description: A Diamond In The Mud. The crew return to West Alexander, Pennsylvania to save a 19th century barn that will prove to be one of their toughest takedowns ever. S15, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Poseidon Crew are desperate to find fine gold to fund their expensive operation. Rookie team Jacqui and Andrew find gold nuggets in Queensland. S6, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked And Afraid
DMAXUK.uk.description: For Better Or A Lot Worse. The first couple to ever take on the challenge test their survival skills and relationship. They face jaguars, anacondas and caiman in the Guyana jungle. S5, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked And Afraid
DMAXUK.uk.description: Feel The Burn. Two superfans battle oppressive heat and relentless insect attacks in Guyana's scorching savanna. Severe dehydration forces a desperate fan to drink unsanitary fluids. S5, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: C&O Railway. The team travels to Clifton Forge, to conquer C&O Railway's vast repair space. Using force and lots of tools, they work to salvage the steam engine repair plant. S8, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Splitting Up Jobs. Robert sends Tay and Grayson to salvage on their own, until the crew comes together to help finish the job. Mike and Ted pick up a nautical structure for a client. S8, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Winter, Lose Or Draw. The worst winter in 100 years is forecast for Nome, Alaska. Shawn chases a jackpot along an ancient riverbed, and Kris goes all-in on new equipment. S10, Ep21

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Snow Man's Land. As another snowstorm approaches Nome, Vernon sets up his operation on the promising Claim 56. The Kellys race to get their new equipment on the ice. S10, Ep22

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: In Western Australia, Alan and Salty hope a local legend will lead them to buried treasure. A new team come face-to-face with the dangers of flying choppers. S9, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Jurassic River Beast. Fisherman and adventurer, Jeremy Wade, travels to the island of Tasmania in search of a colossal freshwater beast on the verge of disappearing forever. S1, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Nautical Deathtrap. Freak tides trap Sig in dangerous seas, as Jake battles to get to port. Rick attempts to turn a heart-wrenching tragedy into a triumph for Jacob. S19, Ep22

DMAXUK.uk.title: Cooper's Treasure
DMAXUK.uk.description: Wreck In The Shallows. Darrell heads to a shipwreck linked to Gordo's list. He leads his team to the shallows where the tough winds and waves have claimed centuries worth of ships. S2, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
DMAXUK.uk.description: Return Of The Yeti. Josh Gates heads into the Himalayas to obtain scientific evidence of the Yeti. This time his mission is personal and takes him into uncharted territory. S1, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Monster And The Mountain. Josh ascends higher into the Himalayas to explore caves. Plus, he investigates the mystical ties the fabled beast has with the Nepalese people. S1, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Winter's Fury. The Raneys help the Russell family, who are struggling on a failing homestead. The food stocks are low, they don't know how to hunt and their cabin is collapsing. S1, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Abandoned & Alone. The Raneys help Beth and Mike, who live in a ghost town in Montana. Stalked by a mountain lion, and devoid of any livestock, water or food, survival is a struggle. S1, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Attack Of The Cacti. After the birth of Daniel's child, the Rookies return to Coober Pedy. Kelly and Al battle a deadly cactus in their hunt for the most valuable opal. S1, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Brother Vs. Brother. Brothers Peter and Mick Cooke face off in a scrapheap challenge to build a opal hunting machine. And, the rookies resort to night time hunting. S1, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Zero Hour. King Crab season draws to a close. Casey forces Josh to fish at full throttle on the Cornelia Marie, and Jake takes another turn at the wheel on the Northwestern. S11, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Hell's Bells. Christmas at sea for the Time Bandit is disturbed when an unhinged deckhand terrorizes the crew. Meanwhile, Jake Anderson awaits the birth of his baby. S11, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition X
DMAXUK.uk.description: Canyon Of The Apes. Chasing Bigfoot's origin story, Phil and Jessica uncover a rash of recent sightings and bone-chilling new evidence in the Pacific Northwest. S2, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Bigfoot
DMAXUK.uk.description: Smells Like Bigfoot. The team uses new methods to find Bigfoot in NorCal's backcountry, hoping to lure it out of hiding. Russell travels overnight to gather key evidence. S5, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Marcus and Linden are confronted by a rival gold prospector. The Gold Timers call in a geologist for help, and Robbie storms off the Ferals' lease. S6, Ep9

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Body Bizarre
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: My Deadly Face Tumor. In Sweden, Kim's had dozens of surgeries on a huge facial tumour, but stopped after he almost died. He needs one more operation - can he go through with it? S4, Ep9

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Body Bizarre
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Worlds Biggest Cyst. Khalida goes to a hospital in Kashmir after suffering intense stomach pains. Doctors operate and are astonished to discover the world's biggest ovarian cyst. S4, Ep10

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Prospectors Jacqui and Andrew uncover gold in Queensland. The Poseidon Crew get some exciting news, while the Dust Devils spend big on new equipment. S6, Ep6

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Naked And Afraid
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Bite Club. A Bear, shark and rattlesnake attack survivor teams up with Brooke, an elite hunter. Together they tackle vicious lions and hyena in the harsh African feeding ground. S5, Ep8

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Naked And Afraid
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Threesome. When a third survivalist crashes the challenge, tension and jealousy prove just as threatening as the heat, piranha and jaguars of the Ecuadorian rainforest. S5, Ep9

Film4.uk.title: M3GAN
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Creepy-doll horror with Allison Williams. A robotics engineer simultaneously invents an AI dolly and takes on the care of her orphaned niece. But can a cyborg really raise a kid?

Film4.uk.title: Late Night with the Devil
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Unsettling found-footage horror with David Dastmalchian. A has-been host tries to save his 70s talk show using a demonically possessed 13-year-old girl. Really, what could go wrong?

Film4.uk.title: Radical
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Uplifting, fact-based drama with Eugenio Derbez. An inspirational teacher literally and figuratively turns his class upside down in a Mexican border town. In Spanish/subs.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: The Man from Colorado
Film4.uk.description: (1948) Western. When a sadistic Union colonel (Glenn Ford) becomes a federal judge after the Civil War, his friend (William Holden) takes the deputy job to try and temper his actions.

Film4.uk.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Secret...
Film4.uk.description: ...Weapon: (1942) WWII spy adventure starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce. Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson attempt to prevent the Nazis from acquiring a revolutionary invention.

Film4.uk.title: Crash Dive
Film4.uk.description: (1943) Second World War drama starring Tyrone Power and Anne Baxter. An ambitious naval officer falls in love with a school teacher before leaving on a dangerous submarine mission.

Film4.uk.title: Hell and High Water
Film4.uk.description: (1954) Cold War thriller. Richard Widmark stars as the leader of a submarine expedition, sent to the frozen depths of Alaska to thwart the Chinese communists' plans to start WWIII.

Film4.uk.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
Film4.uk.description: (2017) Fantasy adventure sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black. Four teenagers are sucked into the Jumanji video game to complete a dangerous quest.

Film4.uk.title: Bohemian Rhapsody Interview...
Film4.uk.description: ...Special: Rami Malek discusses playing Freddie Mercury in the rock biopic about the rise of the band Queen.

Film4.uk.title: Renfield
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Comedy horror vampire shenanigans with Nicholas Hoult, Awkwafina and a full-blooded Nicolas Cage. Dracula's familiar gets distracted from procuring food for his master.

Film4.uk.title: The Hunt
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Fighty, satirical horror that upset Donald Trump. Hilary Swank plays a rich lefty who likes hunting working class people to the death. But she didn't reckon on Betty Gilpin.

Film4.uk.title: Straightheads
Film4.uk.description: (2007) Thriller with Gillian Anderson and Danny Dyer. On their way home from a party in the countryside, a couple are brutally attacked by thugs. Months later, they set out for vengeance.

Film4.uk.title: Countdown
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Supernatural horror. A nurse downloads an app which predicts that she'll be dead within days. As she uncovers its demonic roots, can she change her fate? Violence.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Shadow of a Doubt
Film4.uk.description: (1943) Hitchcock thriller starring Joseph Cotten as a serial killer fleeing the law. Teresa Wright is his adoring niece who, initially, refuses to believe her uncle is a murderer.

Film4.uk.title: The Virginian
Film4.uk.description: (1946) Western romance starring Joel McCrea and Sonny Tufts as a couple of cowboys who compete for the affections of a new schoolteacher from out east, played by Barbara Britton.

Film4.uk.title: Fixed Bayonets!
Film4.uk.description: (1951) Korean War drama about the stress of battle. Officers drop one by one as a US platoon fights a rearguard action, leaving one unwilling man (Richard Basehart) to take their place.

Film4.uk.title: Anzio
Film4.uk.description: (1968) Epic Second World War drama starring Robert Mitchum. A reporter gets trapped behind enemy lines during the costly 1944 Allied invasion of Italy. With Peter Falk and Robert Ryan.

Film4.uk.title: 10 Things I Hate About You
Film4.uk.description: (1999) Teen comedy with Julia Stiles and Heath Ledger. A student is furious to discover her prom date was bribed by her sister to invite her. But confusion ensues when he falls for her.

Film4.uk.title: Independence Day: Resurgence
Film4.uk.description: (2016) Sci-fi blockbuster sequel starring Jeff Goldblum and Liam Hemsworth. Twenty years after Earth repelled a devastating alien invasion, the extraterrestrials return to finish the job.

Film4.uk.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
Film4.uk.description: (2018) Rami Malek turns in an Oscar-winning performance as Freddie Mercury in this rollercoaster musical biopic of the late Queen frontman. Big tunes. Big drama. Bigger teeth.

Film4.uk.title: With or Without You
Film4.uk.description: (1999) Couple Christopher Eccleston and Dervla Kirwin's relationship is tested when her former pen pal, Yvan Attal, turns up in Michael Winterbottom's drama. Strong language/sexual scenes.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Warlock
Film4.uk.description: (1959) Western starring Henry Fonda. A gunfighter is hired to protect a town from a raiding gang. But a vendetta could undermine him. With Anthony Quinn, Richard Widmark and Dorothy Malone.

Film4.uk.title: Decision at Sundown
Film4.uk.description: (1957) Western starring Randolph Scott and John Carroll. A man seeking revenge for his wife's death tracks his rival down in the sleepy town of Sundown...

Film4.uk.title: Arizona Raiders
Film4.uk.description: (1965) William Whitney's brutal western. Two former Confederate rebels are offered their freedom if they can track, catch or even kill their former gang mates. Starring Audie Murphy.

Film4.uk.title: Sink the Bismarck!
Film4.uk.description: (1960) Second World War drama. Kenneth More stars as the British captain charged with finding and destroying the Bismarck, Germany's largest battleship. Directed by Lewis Gilbert.

Film4.uk.title: Sleepless in Seattle
Film4.uk.description: (1993) Romantic comedy with Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan. A bereaved man gets another chance at love when his son puts him on a radio talk show.

Film4.uk.title: White House Down
Film4.uk.description: (2013) All-American action thriller starring Channing Tatum and Jamie Foxx. A Capitol police officer steps up to protect the President when the White House is compromised.

Film4.uk.title: Sicario 2: Soldado
Film4.uk.description: (2018) Action sequel with Benicio Del Toro and Josh Brolin. Two operatives must create a gang war to stop Mexican drug cartels smuggling terrorists into the US.

GBNews.uk.title: Patrick Christys Tonight
GBNews.uk.description: Join Patrick for two hours of spirited debate and news making interviews. Top guests tackle the issues that matter, with a sharp take on every story.

GBNews.uk.title: Patrick Christys Tonight Late...
GBNews.uk.description: Edition. Tomorrow's news, tonight. All the major stories making the front pages and full coverage of all the breaking news at home and abroad with Patrick Christys.

GBNews.uk.description: Live from Washington DC, Bev Turner and Ben Leo bring you the latest from the US and what it means for Britain.
